'''âs-k-g-j''' ('''kasakgejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zither|zither]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zither|zither]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-k-g-j
|-
! Lemma
| kasakgejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisakgejoko|thisakgejoko]] || [[word:jisakgejoko|jisakgejoko]] || [[word:shisakgejoko|shisakgejoko]] || [[word:kisakgejoko|kisakgejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusakgejoko|thuthusakgejoko]] || [[word:jujusakgejoko|jujusakgejoko]] || [[word:shushusakgejoko|shushusakgejoko]] || [[word:kukusakgejoko|kukusakgejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosakgejoko|thosakgejoko]] || [[word:josakgejoko|josakgejoko]] || [[word:shosakgejoko|shosakgejoko]] || [[word:kosakgejoko|kosakgejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsakgejoko|thĂŠsakgejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠsakgejoko|jĂŠsakgejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠsakgejoko|shĂŠsakgejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠsakgejoko|kĂŠsakgejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
